# Welcome

This is the home page of your documentation site. Edit `docs/index.md` to customise it.

!!! tip "Claude is here to help"
    Use the chat panel (bottom-right) to ask Claude to edit, extend, or restructure this documentation. Claude can read and write any page and update the navigation in `mkdocs.yml`.

## What's inside

| Section | Description |
|---|---|
| [Guide](guide/index.md) | Step-by-step guides for common tasks |
| [Reference](reference/index.md) | Detailed reference material |
